findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "register_partner" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Register a new partner organization with Trillboards. WHEN TO USE: - First-time setup for a new partner integration - Creating a new partner account to manage d…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "create_webhook" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Create a new webhook subscription for real-time events. WHEN TO USE: - Setting up real-time notifications for device events - Integrating with external systems …

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "export_cohort" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Export exposed audience cohort to a DSP for retargeting. Pushes MAID hashes from the campaign's exposed cohort to the specified DSP (The Trade Desk, DV360, or M…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "predict_moment_quality" stacks urgency/override words (always, attention). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Predict the VAS (Viewability Attention Score) a specific creative would achieve at a given moment, based on historical data and causal modeling. Uses the Causal…

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "describe_endpoint" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Describe a single API operation including its parameters, response shape, and error codes. WHEN TO USE: - Inspecting an endpoint's full contract before calling …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "validate_request" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Validate a proposed request payload against the registered Zod schema for an operation, returning the exact canonical error envelope the HTTP surface would emit…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: register_device, get_device, list_webhooks, get_webhook_deliveries, get_adcp_capabilities, log_event, list_error_codes · Private data: register_partner, get_partner_info, record_impression, batch_impressions, create_webhook, get_webhook_deliveries, activate_signal, log_event, setup_billing, verify_proof_of_play, get_dataset_stats, describe_endpoint · Public sink: register_partner, device_heartbeat, create_webhook, list_webhooks, update_webhook, delete_webhook, test_webhook, get_webhook_deliveries, log_event, validate_request · Destructive: delete_device, list_webhooks, delete_webhook, get_adcp_capabilities, update_media_buy, sync_creatives, export_dataset.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: register_device, get_device, list_webhooks, get_webhook_deliveries, get_adcp_capabilities, log_event, list_error_codes · Private data: register_partner, get_partner_info, record_impression, batch_impressions, create_webhook, get_webhook_deliveries, activate_signal, log_event, setup_billing, verify_proof_of_play, get_dataset_stats, describe_endpoint · Public sink: register_partner, device_heartbeat, create_webhook, list_webhooks, update_webhook, delete_webhook, test_webhook, get_webhook_deliveries, log_event, validate_request · Destructive: delete_device, list_webhooks, delete_webhook, get_adcp_capabilities, update_media_buy, sync_creatives, export_dataset

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
